textByHash.05cbaed5c894553af0f129a1aea60dec6a3a4e1e: Get out of my way, you fool! Can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.1f38f0a8f550c477d301f6ea10d2f2b4da5cd654: Monkeys these days... you'll be acting like one of those awful Gnomes next...
textByHash.4fb5c7586403bbeb8238dd17dc6941a0d5cdfa13: You're one of those humans that everybody has been talking about! The Marimbo Guard will kill you on the spot!
